title: OrbitMC Mint Pack
description: A collection of Vanilla+ mods used in a private server, but free to use yourself
body:
![OrbitMC Mint Pack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8513fb7b82b285d64d1246ebe8d872c632f72d65.png)

This is a modpacked aimed to add a bunch of extra stuff to my existing Vanilla SMP server without needing a world reset. It should not effect world generation in any way that matters. If you have an existing world or SMP server that you want to spice up with a few Vanilla-adjacent mods, this will work well.

A pre-made server pack is included, just click into the latest version and scroll to the bottom of the page and download the server zip.

### Why "Mint"?
This is one of two modpacks I've made for my server, the other being a [1.12.2 pack that is retroactively renamed the "Strawberry" pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/orbit-modpack). Vanilla -> Mint -> Strawberry.

---
If you find an issue, need help with the server, or general support, DM me on Discord @rinyafii. And [don't ask to ask](https://dontasktoask.com/) or else I may think you are another spam DM. Just let me know what you need and I'll respond when I have time to! 

Enjoy!
